name: fixtures: each g-react-001..010 has a negative fixture (input expected NOT to trigger) at evals/fixtures/react/<rule-id>/negative/
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do test -d "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/react/g-react-$i/negative" || { echo "FAIL g-react-$i negative missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
